scope: Code changes made during this chat session
notes: This log includes user-and-assistant driven code changes that changed behavior, fixed warnings/errors, or altered visible output.
Some early changes were later rebased/merged into main, so this file records the session history, not just the final diff against the current remote.

changes.title: Added checked path-construction helper for dump paths
changes.summary: Introduced a reusable path builder to replace unchecked path formatting for dump directories and dump entry paths.
changes.reason: Fixed multiple snprintf/sprintf truncation and overflow warnings.

changes.title: Replaced unsafe dump-path sprintf/snprintf calls
changes.summary: Swapped raw path-formatting calls for checked path construction at dump folder, dump info, restore, and cleanup call sites.
changes.reason: Prevented silent truncation and removed format-overflow warnings.

changes.title: Reworked fileRestoreHelper to restore by original path metadata
changes.summary: Made restore search dump metadata by stored original Path instead of filename heuristics, then move the dumped entry back and remove its info file.
changes.reason: Made restore behavior reliable and matched the intended dump metadata flow.

changes.title: Simplified fileRestore wrapper around helper logic
changes.summary: Normalized the restore target path, avoided mutating parser-owned arguments, and delegated the restore operation to fileRestoreHelper.
changes.reason: Cleaned up the command entrypoint and fixed prototype consistency.

changes.title: Fixed cleanDump file-handle leak paths
changes.summary: Closed metadata files exactly once before all continue paths in cleanDump.
changes.reason: Removed file descriptor leaks and use-after-close style issues.

changes.title: Stopped mutating sendToDump input path in place
changes.summary: Copied entryPath into a normalized local buffer before trimming trailing slashes and building dump metadata.
changes.reason: Avoided side effects on parser-owned argument strings.

changes.title: Made restore choose the newest matching dumped entry
changes.summary: Changed restore scanning to parse DeletionDate and restore the newest dump entry that matches a requested original path.
changes.reason: Fixed reliance on nondeterministic readdir ordering.

changes.title: Added recursive deletion for dumped directories
changes.summary: Introduced recursive directory removal and used it during old-dump cleanup when an entry in the dump is a folder.
changes.reason: Allowed dump cleanup to work for directories instead of only files.

changes.title: Enabled folder-aware dump handling
changes.summary: Added lstat-based handling so dump logic works with both files and directories rather than assuming regular files everywhere.
changes.reason: Extended the dump/restore system to cover deleted folders as well.

changes.title: Aligned config headers and declarations with actual function signatures
changes.summary: Updated declarations such as fileRestore(Command*) and normalized no-argument prototypes.
changes.reason: Removed hidden prototype mismatches and stricter-compiler issues.

changes.title: Enabled POSIX path/stat support for dump helpers
changes.summary: Adjusted feature-test macro usage so functions like lstat are declared properly.
changes.reason: Resolved implicit declaration warnings for filesystem helpers.

changes.title: Integrated rm with Snail dump instead of permanent delete
changes.summary: Routed rm through sendToDump so deleted entries are recoverable via the dump system.
changes.reason: Matched the trash-style deletion model requested for Snail.

changes.title: Replaced DT_DIR dependence with stat-based directory checks
changes.summary: Stopped using non-portable dirent d_type/DT_DIR checks and used stat/S_ISDIR instead.
changes.reason: Fixed identifier issues and made directory handling more portable.

changes.title: Hardened output-redirection parsing
changes.summary: Rejected stray tokens after redirection targets and blocked multiple output redirections from silently overwriting parser state.
changes.reason: Fixed invalid command parsing and prevented outputFile leaks/overwrites.

changes.title: Added shared output-redirection helper
changes.summary: Factored output redirection into a shared helper used by built-ins and external commands.
changes.reason: Kept redirection logic consistent across execution paths.

changes.title: Fixed built-in output-redirection restore order
changes.summary: Ensured stdout is restored only after a built-in command has run, rather than before.
changes.reason: Made output redirection actually affect built-ins.

changes.title: Added input-redirection parsing
changes.summary: Extended Command with inputFile and added parsing for < input redirection alongside > and >>.
changes.reason: Added stdin redirection support.

changes.title: Added input-redirection helper and execution wiring
changes.summary: Added setupInputRedirection and wired it into built-ins, external commands, and pipeline children.
changes.reason: Enabled commands to read from files through shell syntax.

changes.title: Merged pipeline branch changes with local shell features
changes.summary: Resolved rebase conflicts so pipelines, history/raw-input REPL behavior, dump startup logic, and redirection changes all coexisted.
changes.reason: Integrated concurrent work from the friend's pipeline branch without losing local changes.

changes.title: Added Snail runtime config system
changes.summary: Introduced a structured config file with theme, prompt, startup, UI, and shell settings plus a parser for those values.
changes.reason: Made shell and UI behavior user-configurable.

changes.title: Auto-created user config in the home directory
changes.summary: Made Snail create a home-directory config file automatically from the project template on first run.
changes.reason: Simplified onboarding and established a single user-editable config location.

changes.title: Switched runtime config location to ~/snailShellrc
changes.summary: Changed the active runtime config path from earlier variants to ~/snailShellrc and updated help/UI accordingly.
changes.reason: Matched the desired shell-rc style workflow.

changes.title: Added configurable prompt path formatting
changes.summary: Added full, home_relative, basename, and shortened path display modes.
changes.reason: Made the prompt more flexible and zsh-like.

changes.title: Added configurable prompt colors and metadata sections
changes.summary: Connected prompt color, directory color, user/host display, git branch, duration, and time to config-driven prompt output.
changes.reason: Improved shell visual customization.

changes.title: Added PATH_MAX fallback in prompt code
changes.summary: Defined a local PATH_MAX fallback when the editor/toolchain did not expose one from limits.h.
changes.reason: Resolved PATH_MAX lookup errors in prompt code.

changes.title: Cached prompt timestamp per prompt instance
changes.summary: Made the displayed prompt time reflect when the prompt was shown, instead of updating during every redraw while typing.
changes.reason: Kept prompt time stable and semantically correct.

changes.title: Added last-command duration display
changes.summary: Tracked command execution time and displayed it in the prompt metadata area.
changes.reason: Provided richer shell feedback similar to modern prompts.

changes.title: Added thresholded duration display
changes.summary: Added duration_threshold_ms so tiny commands can skip the duration block while longer ones still show timing.
changes.reason: Reduced prompt noise.

changes.title: Added exit-status indicator
changes.summary: Tracked the last command status and showed non-zero exit codes in the prompt.
changes.reason: Surfaced command failures without extra typing.

changes.title: Added one-line and two-line prompt modes
changes.summary: Introduced two_line_prompt and redraw-aware rendering so the shell can show metadata on a separate line from the prompt symbol.
changes.reason: Enabled a cleaner prompt layout closer to modern shell themes.

changes.title: Added rainbow directory path rendering
changes.summary: Added rainbow_directory so each path segment can render in a cycling rainbow palette instead of one fixed path color.
changes.reason: Added an optional visual style upgrade for the prompt.

changes.title: Executed startup commands from config
changes.summary: Added config-driven startup commands that run when Snail launches.
changes.reason: Allowed user-defined shell startup actions.

changes.title: Made startup behavior config-driven
changes.summary: Connected clean_dump_on_start, clear_screen_on_start, and show_snail_art to the REPL startup flow.
changes.reason: Let users control shell startup presentation and cleanup behavior.

changes.title: Rebuilt the Python UI around the shared config
changes.summary: Rewrote the Tkinter wrapper to read Snail config, use the shell binary from the project directory, and handle PTY lifecycle more cleanly.
changes.reason: Made the optional GUI reflect shell config and behave more robustly.

changes.title: Fixed quoted color parsing in the Python UI
changes.summary: Stripped surrounding quotes from config strings before handing them to Tk color APIs.
changes.reason: Resolved Tk errors like unknown color name for quoted hex values.

changes.title: Simplified GUI layout to a terminal-style single pane
changes.summary: Removed the separate left-side snail panel and switched to a simpler single terminal-like view with an input field below.
changes.reason: Made the GUI closer to the plain shell experience.

changes.title: Added basic ANSI/control-sequence handling in the GUI
changes.summary: Added simple handling for clear-screen, clear-line, backspace, and ANSI color/control sequences in the Tk view.
changes.reason: Improved readability of shell output in the non-terminal GUI wrapper.

changes.title: Added snailHelp built-in command
changes.summary: Added a built-in command that explains shell commands, redirection, config usage, prompt settings, and dump-folder locations.
changes.reason: Made Snail self-documenting from inside the shell.

changes.title: Added dump-folder navigation details to help output
changes.summary: Documented ~/.snailDump and its files/info subdirectories in the built-in help.
changes.reason: Made dump inspection discoverable without reading source code.

changes.title: Added reloadConfig built-in
changes.summary: Added a built-in command to reload ~/snailShellrc without restarting Snail.
changes.reason: Improved the config-edit/test workflow.

changes.title: Added tilde expansion for cd
changes.summary: Made cd support ~ and ~/... paths inside Snail.
changes.reason: Matched normal shell expectations and fixed access to paths like ~/.snailDump.

changes.title: Filtered . and .. from ls output
changes.summary: Skipped dot entries in both normal ls and ls -l output.
changes.reason: Matched typical shell ls behavior and removed noisy entries.

changes.title: Moved config load/refresh responsibilities into prompt-aware startup flow
changes.summary: Adjusted where config and prompt-refresh logic run so startup, Ctrl+C, and prompt redraws all respect current config state.
changes.reason: Kept prompt behavior and config lifecycle consistent.

changes.title: Ignored Python cache files in git
changes.summary: Added __pycache__/ and *.pyc to ignore rules while preserving existing Snail ignores.
changes.reason: Stopped generated Python cache files from polluting status and commits.

changes.title: Rebased local shell/UI work onto friend's interactive rm update
changes.summary: Rebased the session work onto the newer main branch that included the interactive rm update, resolving the only conflict in .gitignore.
changes.reason: Integrated concurrent team changes before pushing.
